goal: ربط الأفكار بوضوح وتجنب الجمل المتلاصقة.
shortDefinition: ربط الأفكار بوضوح وتجنب الجمل المتلاصقة.
uses: and إضافة، but/yet تعارض، or خيار، so نتيجة، for سبب رسمي.
however وtherefore ظروف ربط تحتاج ترقيمًا صحيحًا.
formula: independent clause + coordinator + independent clause | subordinator + dependent clause

examples.english: The journey was long, but I enjoyed it.
examples.arabic: كانت الرحلة طويلة لكنني استمتعت بها.

examples.english: Although it was difficult, I finished it.
The road was closed; therefore, we waited.

commonMistakes.wrong: Although it was hard, but I finished.
commonMistakes.correct: Although it was hard, I finished.
I stopped because I was tired.

memoryTip: لا تربط جملتين مستقلتين بفاصلة وحدها؛ استخدم رابطًا مناسبًا.

exercises.question: صحّح الجملة: Although it was hard, but I finished.
exercises.correctAnswer: Although it was hard, I finished.
acceptedAnswers: Although it was hard, I finished.
Although it was hard, I finished

exercises.question: صحّح الجملة: Because I was tired.
exercises.correctAnswer: I stopped because I was tired.
acceptedAnswers: I stopped because I was tired.
I stopped because I was tired
I stopped because I was tired.
I stopped because I was tired.

exercises.question: أكمل الفراغ: The ___ was long, but I enjoyed it.
هل الجملة صحيحة وفق قاعدة الروابط والجمل المركبة؟ «Although it was difficult, I finished it.»

answers.answer: Although it was hard, I finished.
I stopped because I was tired.
